items.title: Micron (MU) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
items.description: Micron (MU) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +5.94% and +0.47%, respectively, for the quarter ended August 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: Trumps PQC Push Could Boost IBM, Google, NVIDIA & Quantum Pure Plays
items.description: Trump's quantum policy push could fuel IBM, Google, NVIDIA and pure-play stocks like IonQ, Rigetti and D-Wave, lifting adoption and funding prospects.

items.title: Telecom Operators Turn to Real-Time Analytics for Enhanced Network Performance and Customer Satisfaction
items.description: Growth in the Big Data Analytics in Telecom Market is driven by telecom operators' need for real-time analytics to enhance network efficiency and customer experience. The European Commission’s Digital Decade initiative further propels demand for advanced analytics. Dominated by the solutions segment, the market leverages data management tools and cloud-based platforms. Key players like AWS and IBM focus on AI and machine learning for predictive insights. items.title: GSAT Expands Estonia Ground Station to Boost C-3 Satellite Network
items.description: Globalstar expands its Estonia ground station with a $9M investment, boosting its C-3 satellite network and service reach across Europe.

items.title: Palantir vs. IBM: Which Defense AI Stock Is the Better Long-Term Bet?
items.description: Should you invest in the high-growth darling or the stabilizing stalwart?
